/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=thread -g -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 3.5.4 -current_version 3.5.4 -o libCatch2Maind.3.5.4.dylib -install_name @rpath/libCatch2Maind.3.5.4.dylib CMakeFiles/Catch2WithMain.dir/catch2/internal/catch_main.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/Volumes/Progetti Sviluppo/IA/Sovrano/build-tsan/_deps/catch2-build/src" libCatch2d.3.5.4.dylib
